pages.text: There are several ways to get lost hearts back. The exact set depends on the current heart recovery mode. By default only Crystal Hearts restore hearts, though golden apples can also be enabled.

Sleeping in a bed can also restore one heart after a long cooldown, provided your current base hearts are below the bed regen threshold. This gives peaceful players a slow but steady path back to full health.
Admins can restore hearts with commands such as /nights_mediumcore addheart and /nights_mediumcore restoreheart. See the Commands category for the full list.
